description_long: This is a medium-sized sailing yacht with a sleek white hull and two prominent triangular sails, one tan and one green, mounted on two masts. The hull features a rounded bow, a slightly raised stern, and several porthole windows along the side, suggesting an interior cabin space. The deck is equipped with railings and appears to have a central superstructure with additional windows and possible access points. The yacht's design includes visible rigging and support lines for the sails, and the overall structure is streamlined for efficient movement through water. The vessel's exterior is primarily white with subtle blue accents along the waterline, and the sails add a distinctive color contrast. The yacht is likely constructed from fiberglass or composite materials, with metal fittings and glass for the windows.
description: A white sailing yacht with tan and green sails, featuring a streamlined hull, porthole windows, and a central cabin structure. The vessel is detailed with railings, rigging, and a modern deck layout.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the yacht, both sails, porthole windows, and the central cabin structure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, the alignment of the sails, and the narrow profile of the hull.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the hull, both sails, porthole windows, and the superstructure from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stern, the width of the deck, and the arrangement of the sails and rigging.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a rounded bow and slightly raised stern, featuring a smooth white finish with blue accent lines along the waterline and multiple porthole windows on the sides.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level deck with a central superstructure, visible railings along the perimeter, and open walkways on both sides. The deck includes rigging for the sails and appears to have access points to the interior.
attribute_cabin_structure: Central cabin structure with a rectangular shape, multiple side windows, and a possible entry door. The cabin is integrated into the hull and superstructure, with no upper deck or flybridge visible.
